apiRateLimitCrisis.analysis: Rate limits are cascading through night batch (02:00-04:00). Knowledge整理员 (02:00), 日志清理员 (03:00), 知识演化员 (04:00) are all in rapid succession, depleting API quota. 运动提醒员 (07:00) and others also affected. Root cause: multiple API-intensive tasks within short time windows.
apiRateLimitCrisis.recommendedAction: Stagger nightly batch tasks to spread API load. Already applied: 知识演化员 04:00→04:30, 日志清理员 03:00→03:45. Consider also moving 知识整理员 from 02:00 to 02:30 in next cycle.

hourlyCollision.description: 8 tasks at :00 (健康监控员, 邮件监控员, 事件协调员, 回归测试员, 资源守护者, 故障自愈员, 通知协调员, 调度优化员)
hourlyCollision.reason: All completing within 5-50s, status=ok. Recent email timeout (180s) is anomaly, otherwise healthy.

nightlyMaintenanceOptimized.description: 日志清理员→03:45, 每日维护员→03:30, 知识演化员→04:30, 知识整理员→02:00
nightlyMaintenanceOptimized.reason: Staggered from 02:00-04:00 cascade. Still potential overlap with hourly tasks but significantly improved.

morning08.description: 网站监控员 08:10 only. No 每日早报 task exists.

knowledgeOrganizerScriptBug.description: scripts/knowledge-organizer.ps1 has wrong path (OpenClaw vs workspace/knowledge) and Windows 260-char path limit issues
knowledgeOrganizerScriptBug.reason: Script keeps hitting rate limits AND path errors. Needs fix before it can succeed.

optimizationHistory.details: Detected ongoing API rate limit issues affecting 7 tasks. Crisis severity HIGH. Applied partial fixes: 知识演化员 04:00→04:30, 日志清理员 03:00→03:45. Recommend next: move 知识整理员 02:00→02:30 to further stagger night batch.

optimizationHistory.action: Night batch staggered to reduce API rate limit cascade
optimizationHistory.details: 知识演化员 04:00→04:30 (30min offset), 日志清理员 03:00→03:45 (45min offset). Both had consecutive API rate limit failures. New schedule: 02:00 知识整理员 | 03:30 每日维护员 | 03:45 日志清理员 | 04:30 知识演化员.

recommendation: API rate limit crisis detected and partially addressed. Night batch staggered. Next cycle should: (1) consider moving 知识整理员 02:00→02:30, (2) investigate knowledge-organizer.ps1 path bug, (3) monitor if rate limits decrease after stagger. Gateway healthy.
